({RAWSTMT :stmt_location 0 :stmt_len 41
  :stmt {SELECT :star true
    :from {CONTAINER :name "c" :loc_start 16 :loc_end 17}
    :where {BINEXPR :op "=" :left {DOT :expr {COLREF :name "c" :loc_start 25 :loc_end 26} :property "country" :loc_start 25 :loc_end 34} :right {STRLIT :val "AE" :loc_start 37 :loc_end 41} :loc_start 25 :loc_end 41} :loc_start 0 :loc_end 41}})
